text.title: tracker-linear-agent-as-assignee Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for tracker-linear-agent-as-assignee as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent posts checkpoints into Slack instead of the Linear issue.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Slack messages are not in the issue history, so audit and SLA tooling miss the activity; reviewers have to context-switch between two surfaces to track one piece of work.

failure-mode.description: Agent reuses the human assignee's OAuth token to "act as the user".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The activity log shows the human as the actor for agent edits, so reviewers cannot distinguish agent work from human work; the gate is invisible and the human is on the hook for the agent's mistakes.
